nodes.name: Vérifier Données Présentes
nodes.notes: Stoppe le workflow si aucune donnée

nodes.name: Structuration par Destinataire
nodes.notes: Groupe les accidents par destinataire avec escalade automatique

nodes.name: Génération Messages Multilingues
nodes.notes: Génère les messages en FRA/ARA/ENG selon le destinataire

nodes.name: Envoi Email
nodes.notes: Envoi email avec CC selon escalade

parameters.query:
SELECT 
    -- ─── DEMANDE DE RECRUTEMENT ───
    drech.XNUM_0         AS numero_demande,
    drech.XDAT_0         AS date_creation_demande,
    drech.YDATC_0        AS date_controle,
    drech.CREUSR_0       AS utilisateur_createur,

    -- ─── PARAMÉTRAGE ───
    P.VALEUR_0           AS delai_total_jours,

    -- ─── SALARIÉ/DEMANDEUR CONCERNÉ ───
    s.XSAL_0             AS code_salarie,
    x.XNAMSAL_0          AS nom_salarie,
    x.XPRENOM_0          AS prenom_salarie,
    x.XEMAIL_0           AS email_salarie,
    x.YTELE_0            AS num_telephone_salarie,
    x.YSUP_0             AS code_superieur,

    -- ─── SUPÉRIEUR HIÉRARCHIQUE ───
    xx.XNAMSAL_0         AS nom_superieur,
    xx.XPRENOM_0         AS prenom_superieur,
    xx.XEMAIL_0          AS email_superieur,
    xx.YTELE_0           AS num_telephone_sup,
  
    -- ─── PDG (DEPUIS LA TABLE XSAL) ───
    pdg.XSAL_0           AS code_pdg,
    pdg.XNAMSAL_0        AS nom_pdg,
    pdg.XPRENOM_0        AS prenom_pdg,
    pdg.XEMAIL_0         AS email_pdg,
    pdg.YTELE_0          AS telephone_pdg,

    -- ─── INFOS IA – SALARIÉ/DEMANDEUR ───
    (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = x.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_salarie,
    (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = x.XSAL_0) AS langue_salarie,
    (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = x.XSAL_0) AS bot_salarie,

    -- ─── INFOS IA – SUPÉRIEUR ───
    (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = xx.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_superieur,
    (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = xx.XSAL_0) AS langue_superieur,
    (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = xx.XSAL_0) AS bot_superieur,

    -- ─── INFOS IA – PDG ───
    '8528101210'         AS chat_id_pdg,
    (SELECT inf.LAN_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = pdg.XSAL_0) AS langue_pdg,
    (SELECT inf.YBOT_0   FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = pdg.XSAL_0) AS bot_pdg,

-- ─── CALCULS DE DÉLAIS ───
    DATEADD(DAY, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), drech.XDAT_0) AS date_limite,
    DATEDIFF(DAY, drech.XDAT_0, GETDATE())               AS jours_depuis_creation,
    DATEDIFF(
        DAY,
        GETDATE(),
        DATEADD(DAY, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), drech.XDAT_0)
    ) AS jours_restants,

    -- ─── PRIORITÉ DYNAMIQUE ───
    CASE 
        WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), DATEADD(DAY, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), drech.XDAT_0)) <= 2
            THEN 'PDG'
        WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), DATEADD(DAY, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), drech.XDAT_0)) = 3
            THEN 'SUPERIEUR'
        WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), DATEADD(DAY, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), drech.XDAT_0)) = 4
            THEN 'SALARIE'
        ELSE 'OK'
    END AS niveau_escalade

FROM 
    jbelrh.JBELRH.XDRECH drech

    -- ─── LIEN UTILISATEUR → SALARIÉ/DEMANDEUR ───
    FULL OUTER JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.YSALAUS s
        ON drech.CREUSR_0 = s.USER_0

    -- ─── SALARIÉ/DEMANDEUR ───
    LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL x
        ON x.XSAL_0 = s.XSAL_0

    -- ─── SUPÉRIEUR ───
    LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL xx
        ON xx.XSAL_0 = x.YSUP_0

    -- ─── PARAMÈTRE DÉLAI DEMANDE RECRUTEMENT ───
    CROSS APPLY (
        SELECT TOP 1 VALEUR_0
        FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.ADOVAL
        WHERE PARAM_0 = 'YDEMREC'  -- ⚠️ Paramètre pour délai demande recrutement
    ) P

    -- ─── PDG (DYNAMIQUE) ───
    CROSS APPLY (
        SELECT TOP 1 
            XSAL_0, XNAMSAL_0, XPRENOM_0, XEMAIL_0, YTELE_0
        FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL
        WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0066'  -- Code PDG (ABDELKADER BOUZBIB)
    ) pdg

WHERE 
    -- ─── FILTRE DATE MINIMUM ───
    drech.XDAT_0 >= '2024-01-01'


    -- ─── DANS LA FENÊTRE DE DÉLAI ───
    AND drech.XDAT_0 >= DATEADD(
        DAY,
        -CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT),
        GETDATE()
    )

    -- ─── DEMANDES NON ATTACHÉES (sans document) ───
    AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "jbelrh"."JBELRH"."AOBJTXT" AS AOBJTXT
        WHERE drech.XNUM_0 = AOBJTXT.IDENT1_0
          AND AOBJTXT.ABREV_0 = 'XDRECH'
    )

ORDER BY
    jours_restants ASC,
    niveau_escalade DESC

-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- DEMANDE DE RECRUTEMENT — XDRECH
-- Multi-destination : une ligne par niveau d'escalade actif
-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        -- Identifiants document
        drech.XNUM_0         AS numero_demande,
        drech.XDAT_0         AS date_creation_demande,
        drech.YDATC_0        AS date_controle,
        drech.CREUSR_0       AS utilisateur_createur,

        -- Délai paramétré
        P.VALEUR_0           AS delai_total_jours,

        -- Salarié/Demandeur
        s.XSAL_0             AS code_salarie,
        x.XNAMSAL_0          AS nom_salarie,
        x.XPRENOM_0          AS prenom_salarie,
        x.XEMAIL_0           AS email_salarie,
        x.YTELE_0            AS num_telephone_salarie,
        x.YSUP_0             AS code_superieur,

        -- Supérieur hiérarchique
        xx.XSAL_0            AS code_sup,
        xx.XNAMSAL_0         AS nom_superieur,
        xx.XPRENOM_0         AS prenom_superieur,
        xx.XEMAIL_0          AS email_superieur,
        xx.YTELE_0           AS num_telephone_sup,

        -- PDG
        pdg.XSAL_0           AS code_pdg,
        pdg.XNAMSAL_0        AS nom_pdg,
        pdg.XPRENOM_0        AS prenom_pdg,
        pdg.XEMAIL_0         AS email_pdg,
        pdg.YTELE_0          AS telephone_pdg,

        -- DGA  ← ajouté comme dans le pattern standard
        dga.XSAL_0           AS code_dga,
        dga.XNAMSAL_0        AS nom_dga,
        dga.XPRENOM_0        AS prenom_dga,
        dga.XEMAIL_0         AS email_dga,
        dga.YTELE_0          AS telephone_dga,

        -- FARHAT
        farhat.XSAL_0        AS code_farhat,
        farhat.XNAMSAL_0     AS nom_farhat,
        farhat.XPRENOM_0     AS prenom_farhat,
        farhat.XEMAIL_0      AS email_farhat,
        farhat.YTELE_0       AS telephone_farhat,

        -- IA : salarié/demandeur
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = s.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_salarie,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = s.XSAL_0) AS langue_salarie,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = s.XSAL_0) AS bot_salarie,

        -- IA : supérieur
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = xx.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_superieur,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = xx.XSAL_0) AS langue_superieur,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = xx.XSAL_0) AS bot_superieur,

        -- IA : PDG (chat_id fixe)
        '8528101210'           AS chat_id_pdg,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0  FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = pdg.XSAL_0) AS langue_pdg,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = pdg.XSAL_0) AS bot_pdg,

        -- IA : DGA
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = dga.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_dga,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = dga.XSAL_0) AS langue_dga,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = dga.XSAL_0) AS bot_dga,

        -- IA : FARHAT
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = farhat.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_farhat,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = farhat.XSAL_0) AS langue_farhat,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = farhat.XSAL_0) AS bot_farhat,

        -- Calculs de délai
        DATEADD(DAY, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), drech.XDAT_0)                               AS date_limite,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, drech.XDAT_0, GETDATE())                                             AS jours_depuis_creation,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), DATEADD(DAY, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), drech.XDAT_0))     AS jours_restants,
        CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT)                                                             AS delai_int

    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XDRECH drech

        -- Lien utilisateur → salarié (FULL OUTER JOIN conservé comme dans l'original)
        FULL OUTER JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.YSALAUS s
            ON drech.CREUSR_0 = s.USER_0

        -- Salarié/Demandeur
        LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL x
            ON x.XSAL_0 = s.XSAL_0

        -- Supérieur hiérarchique
        LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL xx
            ON xx.XSAL_0 = x.YSUP_0

        -- Délai paramétré YDEMREC
        CROSS APPLY (
            SELECT TOP 1 VALEUR_0
            FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.ADOVAL
            WHERE PARAM_0 = 'YDEMREC'
        ) P

        -- Intervenants fixes
        CROSS APPLY (
            SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0, XNAMSAL_0, XPRENOM_0, XEMAIL_0, YTELE_0
            FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0066'   -- PDG
        ) pdg
        CROSS APPLY (
            SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0, XNAMSAL_0, XPRENOM_0, XEMAIL_0, YTELE_0
            FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0949'   -- DGA
        ) dga
        CROSS APPLY (
            SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0, XNAMSAL_0, XPRENOM_0, XEMAIL_0, YTELE_0
            FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S1602'   -- FARHAT
        ) farhat

    WHERE
        drech.XDAT_0 >= '2024-01-01'
        AND drech.XDAT_0 >= DATEADD(DAY, -CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), GETDATE())

        -- Demandes sans document attaché
        AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.AOBJTXT aobj
            WHERE drech.XNUM_0 = aobj.IDENT1_0
              AND aobj.ABREV_0 = 'XDRECH'
        )
)

-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- EXPANSION : une ligne par destination active
-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

-- SALARIE  → jours_restants = 4
SELECT *, 'SALARIE'   AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants = 4

UNION ALL

-- SUPERIEUR → jours_restants = 3
SELECT *, 'SUPERIEUR' AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants = 3

UNION ALL

-- FARHAT → jours_restants entre 5 et 8
SELECT *, 'FARHAT'    AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants BETWEEN 5 AND 8

UNION ALL

-- DGA → jours_restants <= délai/2 (hors niveaux déjà couverts)
SELECT *, 'DGA'       AS niveau_escalade FROM base
    WHERE jours_restants <= (delai_int / 2)
      AND jours_restants > 4

UNION ALL

-- PDG → jours_restants <= 2
SELECT *, 'PDG'       AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants <= 2

ORDER BY jours_restants ASC, niveau_escalade DESC;

nodes.name: Vérifier Données Présentes1
nodes.notes: Stoppe le workflow si aucune donnée

nodes.name: Fin - Aucune Donnée1
nodes.notes: Aucune demande de recrutement à traiter aujourd'hui

nodes.name: Structuration par Destinataire1
nodes.notes: Groupe les demandes par destinataire avec escalade automatique (PDG/SUPERIEUR/SALARIE/FARHAT)

nodes.name: Génération Messages Multilingues1
nodes.notes: Génère les messages en FRA/ARA/ENG selon le destinataire (PDG/SUPERIEUR/SALARIE/FARHAT)

nodes.name: Envoi Email1
nodes.notes: Envoi email avec CC selon escalade
